entity.label: Uzal
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: A wanderer, a descendant of Joktan (Gen. 10:27; 1 Chr. 1:21), the founder apparently of one of the Arab tribes; the name also probably of the province they occupied and of their chief city.

nodes.label: Uzal
nodes.description: A wanderer, a descendant of Joktan (Gen. 10:27; 1 Chr. 1:21), the founder apparently of one of the Arab tribes; the name also probably of the province they occupied and of their chief city.

verses.text: Dan also and Javan going to and fro occupied in thy fairs: bright iron, cassia, and calamus, were in thy market.
